nodes.name: Schistolais
nodes.summary: Schistolais（Schistolais）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Sierra Leone prinia、White-chinned prinia。

nodes.name: Sierra Leone prinia
nodes.summary: Sierra Leone prinia（Schistolais leontica）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sierra Leone prinia。

nodes.name: Sierra Leone prinia
nodes.summary: The Sierra Leone prinia (Schistolais leontica), also known as the white-eyed prinia, is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ivory Coast, Guinea, Liberia, and Sierra Leone. Its natural habitat is thickets and forest edge, especially in the transition zone between submontane forest and submontane grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss, especially habitat clearance to establish iron ore mines. References Further reading Barlow, C.R.; Payne, R.B.; Payne, L.L.; Sorenson, M.D. (2006). "Sierra Leone Prinia Schistolais leontica in the Fouta-Djalon of Guinea, its song and distribution". Bulletin of the African Bird Club. 13: 45–48.
